bead.title: Detect execute-bead worktree edits even when the agent makes no commits
bead.description: A Codex execute-loop run on ddx-28c15f0e updated FEAT-002, SD-019, and website server docs inside the managed worktree, but DDx classified the attempt as no_changes because it only looked for agent-created commits. Execute-bead must treat a dirty worktree with tracked edits as real output, preserve or land it appropriately, and record accurate result status instead of discarding useful work.
bead.acceptance: execute-bead and execute-loop no longer report no_changes when the worktree contains tracked file modifications without agent-created commits; the attempt preserves or lands the changes and result artifacts reflect the actual diff state
